summary: Iteration 13 - Testing Assessment Scaffolder Overhaul. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed. The overhauled scaffold endpoint correctly returns overallGuidance, documentConnections, rubricAlignment, suggestedStructure with criticalThinking/lectureLinks/rubricCriteria/commonMistakes, and thinkingFramework (Bloom's taxonomy). Dashboard shows 'Your Saved Briefs' section with progress bars. Scaffolder page has 4 document upload zones and guided tour.

issues: Minor React warning: 'Cannot update component while rendering' - cosmetic, not functional

passed_tests: POST /api/scaffold without auth returns 401
POST /api/scaffold without documents returns valid scaffold with overallGuidance, suggestedStructure, thinkingFramework
POST /api/scaffold without documents returns empty documentConnections and rubricAlignment arrays
POST /api/scaffold without documents returns suggestedStructure with criticalThinking prompts per section
POST /api/scaffold without documents returns thinkingFramework with all 6 Bloom's levels (remember, understand, apply, analyse, evaluate, create)
POST /api/scaffold with documents (brief_text, rubric_text) returns full scaffold
POST /api/scaffold with documents returns documentConnections array
POST /api/scaffold with documents returns rubricAlignment array
POST /api/scaffold with documents returns suggestedStructure with criticalThinking, rubricCriteria, lectureLinks, commonMistakes
POST /api/auth/login works with test credentials
GET /api/auth/me returns user data
GET /api/notifications works
GET /api/streak works with current_streak, streak_dates
GET /api/digest/weekly works with period, motivational_message
GET /api/university/intel works
GET /api/briefs/history works (returns 2 briefs)
GET /api/activity/feed works (public endpoint)
Frontend: Login redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Your Saved Briefs' section with 2 brief cards
Frontend: Saved brief cards have progress bars (0%, 43%)
Frontend: All 9 tool cards visible on dashboard
Frontend: Assessment Scaffolder page has 4 document upload zones (Brief, Rubric, Outline, Slides)
Frontend: Scaffolder page has Assignment Type dropdown
Frontend: Scaffolder page has Level dropdown
Frontend: Scaffolder page has Topic input field
Frontend: Scaffolder page has Word Count input field
Frontend: Scaffolder page has 'Generate Deep Scaffold' submit button
Frontend: Scaffolder page has guided tour prompt ('First time here?')
Frontend: Clicking saved brief navigates to /results/{brief_id}
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/scaffold endpoint correctly handles both with-documents and without-documents cases
ScaffolderRequest model properly includes brief_text, rubric_text, outline_text, slides_text fields
Scaffold response includes all required fields: overallGuidance, documentConnections, rubricAlignment, suggestedStructure, thinkingFramework
suggestedStructure sections include criticalThinking prompts with Bloom's taxonomy levels (Analyse, Evaluate, Create)
thinkingFramework includes all 6 Bloom's levels: remember, understand, apply, analyse, evaluate, create
AssessmentScaffolder.js has 4 PdfUploadZone components with correct data-testid attributes
Dashboard.js correctly shows 'Your Saved Briefs' section with progress calculation
GuidedTour component works on scaffolder page with localStorage key 'simplifii_tour_scaffolder'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 2 saved briefs

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check BYPASSED for owner testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 complete. Assessment Scaffolder overhaul tested. POST /api/scaffold now accepts 4 document types (brief_text, rubric_text, outline_text, slides_text) and returns: (1) overallGuidance - strategic overview, (2) documentConnections - cross-document insights with actionItems, (3) rubricAlignment - criterion mapping with whatMarkersWant and lectureConnections, (4) suggestedStructure - sections with criticalThinking prompts (Bloom's levels), lectureLinks, rubricCriteria, commonMistakes, (5) thinkingFramework - all 6 Bloom's taxonomy levels. Without documents, returns valid scaffold with empty documentConnections/rubricAlignment arrays. Frontend has 4 PdfUploadZone components on /assessment-scaffolder page. Dashboard shows 'Your Saved Briefs' section with progress bars. Cookie-based auth working. LLM calls take 30-60 seconds.
